rationale: Trump's contradictory claims about an Iran deal and Tehran's denial create domestic political noise; China arresting a US academic for espionage continues the US-China tension pattern; Toronto consulate shooting investigation ongoing.

top_events.title: Trump claims Iran deal near; Tehran says 'nothing' finalised — leaked terms disputed
top_events.summary: Contradictory US-Iran signals create domestic political uncertainty for Americans; no deal means continued Middle East tension and no oil price relief, but no new escalation either.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US citizen detained by China on espionage charges — a continuation of the pattern raising concerns for Americans traveling to or engaging with China professionally.

top_events.title: Toronto police officer shot while investigating US consulate attack
top_events.summary: A Canadian officer was shot during the investigation into the US consulate attack in Toronto — a direct security concern for US diplomatic personnel and a continuation of the consulate security story.
